entries.title: ClawTree 平台与 TreeFinance 演示案例
entries.answer: ClawTree 是独立的 AI 合作增长网络，为媒体、高校、活动方和 Web3 生态把公开信号转成可信机会、伙伴匹配、人审行动与可验证成果。本仓库用大树财经（TreeFinance）高校行作为参考演示案例：高校内容、能力库和外联身份只是为了展示平台能力，不代表平台本身、客户宣称或已接入工作区。
entries.answerEn: ClawTree is an independent AI partnership intelligence network for media, campuses, event teams, and Web3 ecosystems. It turns public signals into trusted opportunities, partner matches, human-reviewed action, and verifiable outcomes. This repository uses the TreeFinance campus tour as a reference demo case: its campus content, capability library, and outreach identity demonstrate platform capabilities, but do not represent the platform itself, a customer claim, or an onboarded workspace.

entries.title: ClawTree 新手使用指南
entries.answer: 可以从用户端开始：先在「Signals」查看带来源的校园与 AI/Web3 信号，在「活动」和「回顾」中寻找感兴趣的内容；需要了解平台或合作方式时询问 AI 客服；有明确合作意向时前往「申请合作」转人工。也可以进入 Live Demo 查看从信号、匹配、人工审批到链上凭证的完整流程。
entries.answerEn: Start in the Public Portal: explore sourced campus and AI/Web3 signals, then browse Events and Recaps. Ask AI Support about the platform or partnership models. When you have a concrete partnership idea, use Partner with us for human follow-up. You can also open the Live Demo to see the complete flow from signals and matching to human approval and onchain proof.

entries.title: Content Relay 内容接力站
entries.answer: Content Relay 汇总公开内容，完成分类、去重、风险标注和编辑审核，再向国内可访问的用户端发布可信回顾。AI 不能跳过人工审核，也不会复制未确认授权的全文。
entries.answerEn: Content Relay aggregates public material for classification, deduplication, risk labeling, and editorial review before publishing trusted recaps. AI cannot bypass human approval or reproduce full text without confirmed permission.

entries.title: Campus Opportunity Radar
entries.answer: Campus Opportunity Radar 从高校和活动公开来源发现 AI/Web3 合作机会，保留来源与核验状态。公开端不会展示联系邮箱、内部评分、风险原文或模型提示。
entries.answerEn: Campus Opportunity Radar discovers AI/Web3 partnership opportunities from public campus and event sources while retaining provenance and verification status. The public portal never exposes contact emails, internal scores, raw risk text, or model prompts.

entries.title: 三类高校合作模式
entries.answer: 当前可讨论的合作模式分三类：1）媒体支持与活动复盘：整理公开来源、产出活动回顾、协助宣发素材审核；2）嘉宾或线上 Space 联动：围绕 AI/Web3/财经素养组织圆桌、公开课或直播；3）联合活动或黑客松：从议题设计、项目招募、生态伙伴匹配到赛后复盘。AI 可以说明模式和准备清单，但具体资源、嘉宾、时间、费用、权益、主办身份必须逐项人工确认。
entries.answerEn: Three partnership models are open for discussion: 1) media support and event recaps, including public-source summaries, recap production, and reviewed promotional material; 2) guest or online Space collaboration around AI, Web3, and financial literacy; 3) joint events or hackathons, from theme design and project recruiting to ecosystem matching and post-event recaps. AI may explain models and preparation checklists, while resources, guests, timing, fees, benefits, and host status require human confirmation.

entries.title: 合作模式与活动流程
entries.answer: 一次标准合作通常分 6 步：1）信号发现：从高校活动、社团议题、AI/Web3 热点或公开报名信息中发现机会；2）需求确认：确认目标受众、活动形式、时间窗口、内容边界和联系人；3）匹配与方案：AI 生成合作匹配理由、风险提示、内容选题和初版提案；4）人工审批：负责人确认权益、嘉宾、预算、发布授权、隐私和合规边界；5）执行协作：按已确认方案推进宣发、Space、圆桌、工作坊、黑客松或复盘内容；6）复盘与凭证：沉淀来源、成果摘要、审核状态和可公开的链上凭证。学生社团可从“活动/报名/社群需求”开始，高校老师可从“课程主题/合作目标/资源边界”开始。
entries.answerEn: A standard collaboration usually has six steps: 1) signal discovery from campus events, student-group themes, AI/Web3 trends, or public registration pages; 2) needs confirmation around audience, format, time window, content boundaries, and contacts; 3) matching and proposal drafting with AI-generated fit reasons, risks, content angles, and a first proposal; 4) human approval for benefits, guests, budget, publishing rights, privacy, and compliance; 5) execution across promotion, Spaces, roundtables, workshops, hackathons, or recap content; 6) recap and proof, preserving sources, outcome summaries, review status, and public onchain proof when appropriate. Student groups can start from event or community needs; educators can start from course themes, partnership goals, and resource boundaries.

entries.title: 媒体支持与活动复盘边界
entries.answer: 可讨论来源摘要、活动回顾和经批准的媒体协作，但不保证曝光量、传播量或任何结果。素材授权和发布状态需要内容负责人确认。
entries.answerEn: Source summaries, event recaps, and approved media collaboration can be discussed, but exposure, reach, and outcomes are never guaranteed. Content authorization and publishing status require confirmation from the content owner.

entries.title: Space 与圆桌联动边界
entries.answer: 可讨论线上 Space、圆桌或主题公开课联动。嘉宾、主持、主题、时间和平台均需单独人工确认，AI 客服不能代表任何人确认出席。
entries.answerEn: Online Spaces, roundtables, and themed public classes can be discussed. Guests, hosts, topics, timing, and platforms require separate human confirmation; AI support cannot confirm attendance for anyone.

source.label: AI 数据资产 AMA 回顾

entries.title: 黑客松与项目招募边界
entries.answer: 大树财经可讨论 AI×Web3 黑客松的媒体、内容或生态协作；Copilot 对外部黑客松报名问题会优先搜索公开官方页面，并整理报名入口、材料、截止时间、资格和注意事项的核验清单。报名提交必须由用户自行完成；报名资格、开放时间、奖金、算力、投资和主办身份必须以具体活动官方页面及人工确认为准。
entries.answerEn: TreeFinance can discuss media, content, or ecosystem collaboration for AI × Web3 hackathons. For external hackathon registration questions, Copilot first looks for public official pages and summarizes the application entry, materials, deadlines, eligibility, and verification checklist. Users must submit applications themselves; eligibility, windows, prizes, compute, investment, and host status must be verified on the official event page and confirmed by a human when needed.

entries.title: 公开活动报名信息检索
entries.answer: 对于公开活动、比赛、黑客松的报名入口、官网、截止时间和参赛材料，AI 可以先进行网页检索并整理候选官方链接与核验步骤。搜索结果只代表公开网页线索，不等于平台或主办方确认；涉及报名资格、奖项、投资、主办身份、提交状态和个人信息处理时，仍应以官方页面和人工确认为准。
entries.answerEn: For public events, competitions, and hackathons, AI may run web lookup for registration entries, official sites, deadlines, and application materials, then organize candidate official links and verification steps. Search results are public web leads, not platform or organizer confirmation; eligibility, prizes, investment, organizer status, submission status, and personal-data handling must be verified on official pages and by humans when needed.

entries.title: HTX Genesis Hackathon 官方赛事
entries.answer: Genesis 黑客松在本工作区中特指 HTX Genesis Hackathon，官方主题为“Genesis: Code the New Era｜创世纪：代码新纪元”。官方页面显示：赛事由 HTX DAO × B.AI 主办，OpenCSG、TinTinLand、OpenCity 联合承办；方向围绕 AI、Web3 与 AI×Web3 融合，赛道包括 AI 赛道、Web3 赛道和 Genesis 创世纪赛道。赛事免费报名、采用审核制，官方报名链接为 https://opencsg-china.feishu.cn/share/base/form/shrcnvjuubNm15hDU3lLsRMf8Jb ，报名截止时间为 2026 年 7 月 5 日。官方资料还列出 $20,000 总奖池、b.ai 算力支持和生态扶持资源；具体奖项、赛程、入围、奖项兑现和决赛安排以官方 GitBook 最新页面为准。
entries.answerEn: In this workspace, “Genesis Hackathon” refers to the official HTX Genesis Hackathon, themed “Genesis: Code the New Era.” The official GitBook says it is hosted by HTX DAO × B.AI and co-organized by OpenCSG, TinTinLand, and OpenCity. It focuses on AI, Web3, and AI × Web3, with AI, Web3, and Genesis tracks. Registration is free and review-based; the official registration form is https://opencsg-china.feishu.cn/share/base/form/shrcnvjuubNm15hDU3lLsRMf8Jb and the stated registration deadline is July 5, 2026. The official materials list a $20,000 prize pool, b.ai compute support, and ecosystem support; awards, schedule, selection, prize delivery, and final arrangements should follow the latest official GitBook pages.
keywords: Genesis 黑客松 是什么

source.label: HTX Genesis Hackathon 官方 GitBook

entries.title: 广州高校行公开案例
entries.answer: 广州高校行公开信号已经进入内容接力站，可作为高校活动内容、AI/Web3 议题和逐校合作提案的演示案例。真实议程与合作状态仍以人工核验为准。
entries.answerEn: Public signals from the Guangzhou Campus Tour are available in Content Relay as a demo case for campus content, AI/Web3 topics, and campus-specific proposals. The real agenda and partnership status still require human verification.

entries.title: 南京信息工程大学高校行复盘案例
entries.answer: 南信大高校行复盘展示了如何把公开活动内容整理为带来源、编辑说明和审核状态的可信回顾；公开端不复制未授权全文。
entries.answerEn: The Nanjing University of Information Science and Technology campus recap shows how public event content becomes a trusted recap with sources, editorial notes, and review status. The public portal does not reproduce unauthorized full text.

entries.title: 合作咨询与转人工
entries.answer: 如需确认合作资源、具体日期或校方需求，请前往合作咨询页转人工。留资前会说明用途并要求同意；信息仅用于人工跟进，不自动群发、不公开、也不上链。
entries.answerEn: To confirm partnership resources, exact dates, or campus requirements, use the partnership inquiry page for human support. Data use is explained and consent is required; information is only used for human follow-up and is never mass-mailed, published, or written onchain.

entries.title: 隐私、审批与链上边界
entries.answer: AI 只能检索、分类、建议和草拟；公开发布与真实外联必须人工审批。联系人、邮件正文、回复原文、密码、密钥和个人信息不会进入公开页面或链上凭证。
entries.answerEn: AI may retrieve, classify, suggest, and draft; public publishing and real outreach require human approval. Contacts, email bodies, raw replies, passwords, keys, and personal information never enter public pages or onchain proofs.
keywords: 如何使用我的个人数据

entries.title: 全球足球赛事主题内容边界
entries.answer: 全球足球赛事只作为公共事件、财经素养和信息核验案例。ClawTree 不提供博彩、比分预测、荐股、收益承诺或结果保证。
entries.answerEn: Global football is used only as a public-event, financial-literacy, and information-verification case. ClawTree does not provide betting advice, score predictions, stock tips, return promises, or outcome guarantees.

source.label: 全球足球赛事 × 广州高校行 Demo
